prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, controlled pacing with deliberate cuts and extended holds.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Warm raking light catches a cluster of jeering faces while the wooden cross upright and the crowd beyond sink into deep brown-black shadow; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
A tight cluster of weathered bearded faces is gathered at the foot of a rough wooden cross, lips curled and shot out in scorn, heads tilted, eyes lifted upward in derision. The dark grain of the cross upright rises at the edge, a bare leg of the crucified figure just within the upper edge of view. Deep shadow swallows the crowd beyond. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the cluster of jeering faces at the foot of the cross.

Cut to mid framing — the front row of scornful, upturned faces.

Cut to close-up — one weathered face, lip curled in derision, eyes lifted.

Cut to insert — a weathered hand resting on a neighbour's shoulder in the crowd.

Cut to upper framing — the dark cross upright and the bare leg of the crucified figure at the top edge.

Cut to close-up — another scornful face, brow furrowed and eyes narrowed upward.

Cut to insert — a head tilted in mockery, grey beard catching the light.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the jeering crowd beneath the cross.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Cruel, oblivious derision.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image
